welcome:
Juju CLI Prototype — Migration & Bootstrap Observability

This prototype demonstrates two design approaches for viewing
migration and bootstrap status.

PATH A — Integrated into existing commands:
  juju models                          (migration column in table)
  juju show-model my-db-model          (active migration block)
  juju show-model my-db-model-failed   (failed migration block)
  juju show-model frontend             (no migration — baseline)
  juju controllers                     (controllers table)
  juju show-controller jaas-prod-eu    (bootstrap block)
  juju show-controller test1           (no bootstrap — baseline)

PATH B — First-class objects:
  juju jaas migrate-model              (interactive migration flow)
  juju jaas migrations                 (list all migrations)
  juju jaas migration mig-a3f74b       (active migration details)
  juju jaas migration mig-e812cc       (failed migration details)
  juju jaas bootstrap-controller       (interactive bootstrap flow)
  juju jaas bootstraps                 (list all bootstraps)
  juju jaas bootstrap boot-7d29af      (bootstrap details)

Type 'juju --help' for command help.

juju.description: Juju CLI — Migration and bootstrap observability prototype

models.description: [Path A] List models with inline migration status
example: List all models on the current controller with migration status

handler.output:
Use --refresh option with this command to see the latest information.

Controller: test1

show-model.description: [Path A] Show model details including migration state
example: Show a model with an active migration
Show a model with no migration
